introSection: Merlin's Revenge is a steel roller coaster located at Castle Park in Riverside, California, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: After the train climbs the lift hill, riders travel through several of twists and turns before reaching the brake run.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Blue track and yellow supports. The coaster opened with pink track and green supports.

fullText:
Merlin's Revenge is a steel roller coaster located at Castle Park in Riverside, California, USA.

After the train climbs the lift hill, riders travel through several of twists and turns before reaching the brake run.

Blue track and yellow supports. The coaster opened with pink track and green supports.
